message:
fix(telemetry): allow usage store updates for existing keys when at capacity

Previously, CapabilityUsageStore::record() rejected all events once
max_entries was reached, including updates to existing aggregate keys.
This caused silent data loss for active capabilities when the store
filled up with diverse keys.

Fix: move key computation before the capacity check and only reject
when the key is genuinely new. Adds a regression test confirming
existing keys can be updated at capacity while new keys are rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
